description.expectsConfig: and expects app-level column config, filters, and API hooks. Use List, Pagination, and Inputs pages for related primitives; wire the full table in your app with real data sources.

draft.content: Draft content preserves state when switching tabs.

analytics.content: Analytics panel with charts and trend data.

overview.content: Overview panel with summary metrics and quick actions.

settings.content: Settings panel for configuration and preferences.

paragraph.body: Body text — default paragraph style from the typography module.
paragraph.title: Paragraph

variantsSeverities.title: Variants × severities
variantsSeverities.description: variant: contained | outlined | text — default is contained.

fixedNumericSize.title: Fixed numeric size
fixedNumericSize.description: size as number sets width/height in px (icon-style control).

iconVariant.title: Icon variant
iconVariant.description: variant="icon" — use children or the icon prop.

iconButtonVariant.title: Icon button variant
iconButtonVariant.description: variant="icon-button" — square icon-only actions (common with severity="input").

labelProp.title: label prop
labelProp.description: Use label instead of children when you want a dedicated label slot.

icons.title: Icons
icons.description: leftIcon, rightIcon, or icon (replaces main content when set).

fullWidth.title: fullWidth
fullWidth.description: fullWidth stretches the button to the container width.

loading.title: Loading
loading.description: isLoading shows a spinner and disables interaction.

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: disabled prevents clicks; pairs with isLoading.

tooltip.title: Tooltip
tooltip.description: tooltip wraps the button in a HoverCard; configure with tooltipOptions.

asChild.title: asChild
asChild.description: Merges styles onto a single child element (e.g. link styled as a button).

classNameStyle.title: className & style
classNameStyle.description: Extra Tailwind classes and inline styles merge with variants.

propsReference.title: Props reference
propsReference.content:
variant?: "contained" | "outlined" | "text" | "icon" | "icon-button"
severity?: "primary" | "secondary" | "success" | "warning" | "danger" | "info" | "input" | "muted"
size?: "xs" | "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "xl" | number
rounded?: "sm" | "md" | "lg" | "full" | "circle"
fullWidth?: boolean
icon?: ReactNode
label?: string
isLoading?: boolean
leftIcon?: ReactNode
rightIcon?: ReactNode
children?: ReactNode
disabled?: boolean
type?: "button" | "submit" | "reset"
onClick?: (e) => void
className?: string
style?: CSSProperties
tooltip?: string
tooltipOptions?: { openDelay?, closeDelay?, side?, align?, className?, sideOffset? }
asChild?: boolean
id?: string

fullwidth.title: fullWidth
fullwidth.description: fullWidth stretches the button to the container width.

aschild.title: asChild
aschild.description: Merges styles onto a single child element (e.g. link styled as a button).

classnameStyle.title: className & style
classnameStyle.description: Extra Tailwind classes and inline styles merge with variants.

singleCollapsible.title: Single collapsible
singleCollapsible.description: Only one section open at a time. Click the active trigger again to collapse it.

whatIsLibrary.content: A collection of production-ready React components built with Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI, and motion-first interactions.

darkMode.content: Yes. Toggle between light and dark themes using the header control. Theme preference is persisted in local storage.

staticSite.trigger: Can I use it in a static site?
staticSite.content: Absolutely. This showcase is built with Vite and exports to static HTML, CSS, and JS.

multipleOpen.title: Multiple open
multipleOpen.description: Expand several sections at once — each panel toggles independently.

designTokens.content: Semantic colors, spacing, and typography variables.

accessibility.content: Built on Radix primitives with keyboard navigation.

composition.content: Root, item, trigger, and content are separate primitives you can style and arrange.

singleExclusive.title: Single exclusive
singleExclusive.description: Without collapsible, an open section stays open until another is selected.

account.content: Update your profile, email, and display name.

billing.content: Manage payment methods and download invoices.

notifications.content: Choose which alerts you receive by email or push.

defaultOpen.title: Default open
defaultOpen.description: Use defaultValue to expand a section on first render.

shipping.content: Orders ship within 2 business days via standard courier.

returns.content: This section starts open. Returns are accepted within 30 days.

defaultOpenMultiple.title: Default open (multiple)
defaultOpenMultiple.description: Pass an array to defaultValue when type is multiple.

tokens.content: Colors, spacing, and typography scale from your theme.

a11y.content: Keyboard focus moves between triggers; panels expose aria-expanded.

motion.content: Content height animates with accordion-up and accordion-down keyframes.

controlled.title: Controlled
controlled.description: Drive open state with value and onValueChange from outside the accordion.

profile.content: Edit your name, avatar, and public bio.

security.content: Change password and review active sessions.

disabledItems.title: Disabled items
disabledItems.description: Set disabled on AccordionItem to block interaction and skip keyboard focus.

available.content: This panel can be opened and closed normally.

locked.content: This content is not reachable while the item is disabled.

another.content: Focus moves past the disabled item when tabbing through triggers.

singleItem.title: Single item
singleItem.description: Minimal accordion with one expandable panel.
singleItem.content: Version 2.4 adds accordion animations and improved keyboard support.

richContent.title: Rich content
richContent.description: Panel bodies support paragraphs, lists, and nested layout.
richContent.listItem1: Install the package and peer dependencies.
richContent.listItem2: Wrap your app with the theme provider.
richContent.listItem3: Import Accordion primitives from the common barrel.
richContent.outro: Each step links to docs in a real application.

builtInAlerts.description: Preset states used across data views — each shown in a compact panel, not full width.

userAvatarCompat.title: UserAvatar compatibility
userAvatarCompat.description: Legacy UserAvatar wrapper still maps to the new Avatar API.

compound.title: Compound content

compound.heading: Ship dashboards faster

severities.title: Severities
severities.description: Semantic tone variants with the soft appearance.

severities.successDescription: Confirm completed actions or positive outcomes.
severities.dangerDescription: Surface errors, blocks, or destructive context.
severities.infoDescription: Share neutral tips and informational copy.
